creator: stitzinger_rupert@web.de
text:
When using jwm with the standard .jwmrc and german keyboard AltGr does'nt activate special symbols (@, | , etc.) as supposed. The symbols are not composed

Fix: 

In section <!-- Key bindings -->
change
   <Key mask="A" key="Tab">nextstacked</Key>
to
   <Key mask="A" key="Tab">next</Key>
How-To-Repeat: Use standard .jwmrc and type AltGr with special character
